narrative:
Ross County has 44,901 registered voters, with 57.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.6%, a clear Republican lean of 7.4 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 28.8% of registrants.
